zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund Willoughby於1360年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾沃拉阿頓時，他的父親Edmund Willoughby25歲，母親Alice Somerville31歲。他於1370年11月25日與Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1396年在他的家鄉享年36歲。

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund Willoughby was born in 1360, in Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Edmund Willoughby, was 25 and his mother, Alice Somerville, was 31. He married Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby on 25 November 1370, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1396, in his hometown, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund Willoughby est né en 1360, à Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Willoughby, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Somerville, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby le 25 novembre 1370, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1396, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Willoughby è nato il nel 1360 nel Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Edmund Willoughby, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alice Somerville, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby il 25 novembre 1370, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1396, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Willoughbyが1360年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオラトンで生まれた時，父Edmund Willoughbyは25歳，母Alice Somervilleは31歳であった。1370年11月25日にイギリスイギリスでIsabel Annesely baroness willoughbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1396年に故郷で36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Willoughby(이)가 1360년 영국 노틴그함실르 울라턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Willoughby(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Somerville(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1370년 11월 25일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1396년 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby em 25 de novembro de 1370, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1396, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund Willoughby родился в 1360 г. в местности воллатон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund Willoughby было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Somerville, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby 25 ноября 1370 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1396 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет.
